minor.message: Two header comments still say 'OpenShell Sandbox' after the Docker pivot (unchanged lines, cosmetic).
AC#8 runtime-check test loosened to an OR regex (/docker/||/openshell/) that could pass even if the docker check were removed (residual OpenShell comment strings satisfy it).

suggestion.message: Document that a commented-out authors list = everyone untrusted (safe fail-closed default).

minor.message: Stale OpenShell references in the test comment block.
Stale assertion error message 'blocks when OpenShell is unavailable'.
No structural test asserts AI_SDLC_SANDBOX_INTEGRATION_TESTS is injected into the sandbox job env.

suggestion.message: Tighten AC#8 test to match 'command -v docker'/'docker info' rather than a loose OR regex.

minor.message: Pre-existing docs (also concepts/untrusted-contributor-verification.md:180, api-reference/rfc-0043-ucvg.md:646) still name AISDLC_SIGNING_KEY_PATH as the secret — stale vs canonical AISDLC_SIGNING_KEY_CONTENT. Non-security; out of this PR's scope (pre-existing files).
